source_pr.title: store/tikv: fix retry without limit when committing the primary
source_pr.body:
Hi,

This PR tries to fix the retry without limit when committing the primary. If error happens when committing the primary, it will return a predefined error as "result undetermined" and then drop the connection to the corresponding mysql client.

PTAL @disksing @tiancaiamao @zimulala @AndreMouche

symptoms: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector.
failure_signature: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to environment/external dependencies (resource contention, ports, or real cluster timing). This PR stabilizes it by: store/tikv: fix retry without limit when committing the primary.
fix_pattern: store/tikv: fix retry without limit when committing the primary

evidence: evidence: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector.
files: server/conn.go, store/tikv/2pc.go, store/tikv/2pc_test.go, store/tikv/backoff.go, store/tikv/isolation_test.go, terror/terror.go, terror/terror_test.go
